calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Application For Default Judgment By Court And Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Zachery A. Lopes, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, KEVIN CHESSEN.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) PAMELA IACINI.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 and Defendant Angels Pool Service dismissed without prejudice..
Plaintiff Kevin Chessen sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $22,889.44
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,387.17
Attorney's Fees: $2,712.50
Costs: $3,479.22
Total Judgment in the amount of $30,468.33
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-30-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
